title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Rippling is building the operating system for work. We're hiring a Junior Frontend Developer to build beautiful, responsive interfaces for our HR and IT management platform used by thousands of companies. You'll work with modern frontend technologies, collaborate with senior engineers, and have direct impact on how enterprises manage their workforce.
responsibilities: Build and maintain React components and user interfaces for our platform
Implement responsive designs using CSS and modern layout techniques
Write unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and maintainability
Collaborate with designers and product managers to translate designs into functional features
Optimize frontend performance and address browser compatibility issues
Participate in code reviews and contribute to frontend architecture discussions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Unlimited PTO and flexible work hours
On-campus lunch and snacks, fitness benefits
